content.verdict: Bill & Coo is the most design-forward adults-only boutique on Mykonos — a 34-suite property above Megali Ammos beach with sweeping Aegean views, a contemporary art-filled aesthetic, and the refined nightlife and culinary energy that makes Mykonos the most glamorous island in the Cyclades. If your honeymoon vision includes stunning design, excellent cocktails, world-class dining, and access to the island's legendary beach and nightlife scene while retreating to a private adult sanctuary, Bill & Coo is the ideal Mykonos base.
content.best_room: The Prestige Suites with private plunge pool and Aegean sea views are the definitive honeymoon rooms — generous terraces, contemporary Cycladic design, heated plunge pools, and the shimmering Aegean as a constant backdrop. The ultra-private Villa Suite with its panoramic views and separate living areas is the ultimate option for couples wanting the maximum privacy and space that Mykonos has to offer.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Aegean Design Welcome
itinerary_7_nights.description: Arrive at Bill & Coo and be immediately struck by the design intelligence of the property — contemporary art, clean-lined Cycladic whites, and the Aegean spread below from every vantage point. Megali Ammos beach is visible from the pool terrace. The welcome cocktail at the infinity pool as the Aegean light shifts toward golden hour sets up a first evening that begins at the hotel's award-winning restaurant.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Megali Ammos & Mykonos Town
itinerary_7_nights.description: Start the morning at Megali Ammos beach, just a short walk below the hotel, for swimming before the beach fills up. After lunch at the pool terrace, take a taxi to Mykonos Town (Chora) for an afternoon exploring the famous Little Venice waterfront, the five windmills, and the labyrinthine white lanes with their boutiques and galleries. Return to Bill & Coo for sunset cocktails.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Super Paradise & Psarou
itinerary_7_nights.description: Mykonos is famous for its beaches — take a water taxi from the Old Port to explore. Psarou is the most exclusive beach on the island, with superyachts anchored offshore. Super Paradise is wilder and more social. Both offer sun lounger service and beach restaurants. Return to Bill & Coo for an evening at the resort and a dinner reservation at one of Mykonos Town's finest restaurants.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Delos Day Trip
itinerary_7_nights.description: The sacred island of Delos — just a 30-minute boat ride from Mykonos — is one of the most important archaeological sites in the Aegean, the mythological birthplace of Apollo and Artemis. Hire a private guide for a morning on this uninhabited island of ancient temples and mosaics, then return to Mykonos for a long beach afternoon and the island's famous sunset ritual.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa & Culinary Mykonos
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning spa treatments at the Bill & Coo wellness space, then a private cooking class in the afternoon focusing on Mykonian specialties — loukoumades (honey dumplings), kopanisti cheese, and fresh fish preparations. In the evening, explore Mykonos Town's restaurant scene — the island has become one of the best dining destinations in Greece, with exceptional variety.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Yacht Charter
itinerary_7_nights.description: Hire a private sailing yacht from Mykonos harbor for a full day on the Aegean. Sail to the tiny uninhabited islands around Mykonos for snorkeling in extraordinary clarity, anchor for lunch aboard, and explore the rocky coastline and sea caves that day-trippers never reach. Return to Bill & Coo for a final sunset dinner that celebrates a perfect week.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell Morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: A slow, pool-terrace breakfast as the Aegean reflects the morning sky. The Bill & Coo team's farewell is warm and design-conscious — there may be a curated set of Mykonian products or artisan items to take home. The short transfer to Mykonos airport takes you past the windmills one last time.

caveats: Mykonos is the most party-focused island in the Cyclades — peak season (July-August) brings significant crowds, noise, and a frenetic energy that is thrilling for some couples and overwhelming for others. Bill & Coo provides an adult retreat, but the island's energy cannot be entirely avoided.
The hotel's beach access is at Megali Ammos, which is close but is a public beach rather than a private hotel beach — it can be crowded during peak season.
Mykonos is one of the most expensive islands in Greece; dining, transport, and activities add up quickly beyond the hotel costs.

faqs.question: Is Bill & Coo good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: It is the best adults-only boutique on Mykonos and an excellent honeymoon base for couples who want a mix of design luxury, culinary excellence, and access to the island's famous beach and social scene. For couples who want something quieter and more secluded, Amanzoe or Santorini options may be better suited.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit?
faqs.answer: June and September are the sweet spots for Mykonos — warm, beautiful, and somewhat less overwhelmed by the peak August crowds. May is lovely for a quieter experience. The hotel is open from April through October.

faqs.question: What should we book in advance?
faqs.answer: Book the hotel well ahead for summer dates. Reserve Delos guided tours in advance (the island has limited daily visitor numbers). Private yacht charters should be booked at least 3-4 weeks ahead in peak season. Restaurant reservations at the top Mykonos Town restaurants can require advance booking especially in July-August.

faqs.question: Is it adults-only?
faqs.answer: Yes, Bill & Coo is strictly adults-only. This significantly enhances the experience for honeymooners, creating a sophisticated, couples-focused atmosphere throughout the property.

faqs.question: What's the best room type for a honeymoon?
faqs.answer: A Prestige Suite with private plunge pool and sea views is the ideal honeymoon room — the private pool terrace above the Aegean is the defining Bill & Coo experience. The Villa Suite offers more space and total privacy if the budget allows.

faqs.question: How do we get there?
faqs.answer: Fly directly into Mykonos (JMK) from Athens (45 minutes) or direct from major European cities in summer. From the airport, Bill & Coo is a 10-minute taxi ride. Alternatively, arrive by high-speed ferry from Athens Piraeus (about 3-4 hours) or from Santorini — a beautiful inter-island Cyclades journey.
